intent.description: The user needs urgent AC repair services as their AC is not cooling at all.
intent.raw_input: My AC is not cooling at all, I need someone urgently in DHA Lahore. Budget around 2000-5000 rupees.

matched_providers.name: Bilal Ahmad
matched_providers.match_reason: Matches service type (AC technician), located in DHA, within budget, high rating and many reviews.

discovery.search_summary: Found one suitable provider in DHA Lahore for urgent AC repair services within the specified budget.

ranked_providers.name: Bilal Ahmad
ranked_providers.recommendation: Bilal Ahmad is the top choice due to his high rating, ample positive reviews, and alignment with the user's budget.

ranking.ranking_summary: Providers were ranked primarily by rating, followed by reviews count, price match within budget, and availability.

pricing.negotiation_tip: Consider discussing the urgency and potential need for parts to see if the provider can offer a discount.
pricing.price_transparency: The base price for urgent AC repair is PKR 2000. Due to the urgency of the request, a 20% premium (PKR 400) is added. A platform fee of PKR 600 is included to cover service costs, leading to a total price range of PKR 2400 to PKR 5200.

booking_data.description: The user needs urgent AC repair services as their AC is not cooling at all.

confirmation.confirmation_message: Thank you for choosing KhidmatAI! Your urgent AC repair service has been successfully booked with Bilal Ahmad. Our technician will arrive at your location in DHA Lahore within 2-4 hours. We understand the importance of quick service, especially during this time. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
confirmation.urdu_message: KhidmatAI ka shukriya! Aapka urgent AC repair service Bilal Ahmad ke sath dakhil kar diya gaya hai. Hamara technician aapke maqam DHA Lahore par 2-4 ghante ke andar aayega. Hum samajhte hain ke is waqt jaldi service kitni ahem hai. Agar aap ko koi sawaal hai, toh bejhijhak humse raabta karein.
booking_instructions: Please ensure that someone is available at the location during the scheduled time.
Prepare any necessary details about the AC issue for the technician.
Feel free to reach out to us if you need any assistance.
confirmation.cancellation_policy: You can cancel the booking for a full refund up to 1 hour before the scheduled service.

user_notification.title: Your AC Repair Appointment is Confirmed!
user_notification.body: Dear Customer, your AC repair service is confirmed with Bilal Ahmad. He will arrive at your location in DHA Lahore between 2 PM and 4 PM. Thank you for choosing KhidmatAI!
user_notification.sms_text: AC repair confirmed with Bilal Ahmad in DHA Lahore, ETA 2-4 PM.

provider_notification.title: New Job Assigned: AC Repair
provider_notification.body: Bilal Ahmad, you have a new job for AC repair in DHA Lahore. Please contact the customer at demo_user_001. Ensure to arrive between 2 PM and 4 PM.
provider_notification.sms_text: New job for AC repair in DHA Lahore. Contact demo_user_001. Arrive 2-4 PM.

followup_message.title: ہماری سروس کے بارے میں آپ کی رائے!
followup_message.body: السلام علیکم! ہمیں امید ہے کہ Bilal Ahmad نے آپ کے AC کی مرمت اچھی طرح کی ہوگی۔ کیا آپ کو سروس سے مطمئن ہوں؟ مہربانی فرما کر 1 سے 5 ستاروں میں اپنا ریٹ دیں۔ اگر آپ کے پاس کوئی فیڈبیک یا مسئلہ ہو تو براہ کرم ہمیں بتائیں، ہم آپ کی مدد کرنے کے لیے حاضر ہیں!
followup_message.sms_text: AC repair service complete! Please rate us 1-5 stars & share any feedback.
followup_message.rating_prompt: مہربانی فرما کر 1 سے 5 تک ستارے دیں!
followup_message.feedback_prompt: آپ کے خیال میں ہم کس طرح مزید بہتری لا سکتے ہیں؟

quality_checklist: کیا آپ کی مسئلہ فوری طور پر حل ہوا؟
کیا تکنیشن کی سروس کے معیار سے آپ مطمئن ہیں؟
کیا آپ کو کسی قسم کی چالاکی یا گڑبڑ محسوس ہوئی؟
followup.escalation_trigger: اگر کسٹمر نے 2 ستاروں سے کم ریٹنگ دی یا سروس میں سنجیدہ مسائل بتائے

summary.confirmation: Thank you for choosing KhidmatAI! Your urgent AC repair service has been successfully booked with Bilal Ahmad. Our technician will arrive at your location in DHA Lahore within 2-4 hours. We understand the importance of quick service, especially during this time. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
